title: Median of Two Sorted Arrays
coreIdea: Find the median of two sorted arrays in O(log(min(m,n))) by binary searching on the smaller array to find a correct partition point where all elements on the left of both partitions are smaller than all elements on the right.
recognitionCues: asks for median with a strict log-time complexity requirement
combined array length can be odd or even
approach: Binary search on the smaller array's partition index. For each candidate partition, compute the corresponding partition in the other array. Check if left-max of both partitions <= right-min of both partitions. Adjust binary search bounds until this condition holds, then compute median from the four boundary values.
